title: Fire destroys home of Nappies family
description: GEORGE NEWS - The home of the Nappies family...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The home of the Nappies family in Themablethu was razed down in the early morning hours today, 28 December.


> Siyamthanda Nappies (18), a learner from Parkdene High School, said the fire started around 03:00. The family lost all their belongings in this fire.


According to Siyamthanda Nappies, no one was injured.


> The cause of the fire is still unknown.


The family is asking help from the George community. Their address is 26th Street 238, Zone 6, Thembalethu (next to Tyholora Primary School).

According to Siyamthanda Nappies, no one was injured.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
